design_philosophy: Authority, clarity, and trust. Dense-but-clear information architecture with progressive disclosure. Using deep blue to ground the UI and gold to draw attention to key actions.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900
typography.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-900

spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12

surfaces_and_components.marketing_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/50 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_components.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200
surfaces_and_components.primary_button: bg-[#1e40af] text-white px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg font-medium hover:bg-[#1e3a8a] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#f59e0b] focus:ring-offset-2
surfaces_and_components.accent_button: bg-[#f59e0b] text-white px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg font-medium hover:bg-[#d97706] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1e40af] focus:ring-offset-2

hero_background.description: Abstract deep blue and gold geometric shapes for landing page hero.

data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) and key informational components MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case representing their role. Examples: data-testid='enroll-button', data-testid='course-progress-bar', data-testid='sidebar-nav-link'.
instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts (no generic cards) to achieve overlapping/asymmetry where appropriate, but use Shadcn for standard elements.
For the dashboards (Student, Educator, Admin), use Shadcn components (tables, dialogs, charts) heavily. Ensure the layout is a 'Control Room' grid (dense, compact spacing).
All navigation must be a deep blue sidebar with collapsible sections, except for the public landing page which should have a sticky top nav.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans'. Ensure tight tracking for headings.
No pure white (#ffffff) background for the main app surface—use #f8fafc (slate-50). Use #ffffff only inside cards to create depth.
Ensure all user-facing charts use rechart or shadcn/ui charts with primary (#1e40af) and accent (#f59e0b) colors.
When displaying course thumbnails, ensure they are max-h-[80vh] responsive and use the provided media URLs. DO NOT USE placeholder images.
Provide clear progress indicators everywhere (courses, quizzes, videos) using the defined progress_bar styles.
